name: Infinity Bank (Santa Ana, CA)
summary: Infinity Bank provides various commercial banking products and services for individuals and businesses in Southern California. The company accepts checking and savings accounts. Its loan products include personal loans and home equity lines of credit; and business term loans, business lines of credit, accounts receivable financing, commercial real estate loans, construction loans, small business administration loans, and letters of credit. The company also offers debit and credit cards; and treasury management, bill pay, ATM, automatic loan payment, direct deposit, night drop, overdraft, wire transfers, ACH, merchant, remote deposit capture, armored car and cash vault, and online and mobile banking services. Infinity Bank was founded in 2018 and is based in Santa Ana, California.
